name: Into the Last 16
angle: The Round of 16 gets under way with the bracket finally set: Argentina survived a Cape Verde scare, Egypt reached the knockouts for the first time, and a blockbuster Portugal v Spain tie awaits.

questions.question: The standout tie of the last 16 pits two Iberian neighbours against one another. Which pair?
Who survived a huge scare from World Cup debutants Cape Verde, winning 3-2 after extra time to reach the last 16?
Which co-host nation face Belgium in the Round of 16?
England's Round of 16 opponents are which co-host nation?
France, chasing back-to-back finals, face which South American side that stunned Germany on penalties?
Morocco, who knocked out the Netherlands on penalties, meet which co-host in the last 16?
Egypt reached the knockout stage for the first time in their history, edging Australia 1-1 by what means?
Who scored the only goal as Colombia beat Ghana 1-0 to set up a last-16 meeting with Switzerland?
Lionel Messi's early strike against Cape Verde moved him one goal clear at the top of the 2026 Golden Boot race, ahead of which rival?
Erling Haaland's Norway, in their first World Cup since 1998, face which five-time champions in the last 16?
Argentina's decisive goal against Cape Verde, in the 111th minute, came off a header from which centre-back before deflecting in?
Which Cape Verde midfielder cancelled out Messi's opener to level the tie at 1-1?
Portugal v Spain revives their 2010 last-16 meeting, won 1-0 by Spain on the way to the title. Who scored the only goal that day?
The 2026 World Cup is only Egypt's fourth. Before this tournament, when did they last appear at the finals?
Cape Verde became the smallest nation ever to reach a World Cup knockout stage. Roughly what is their population?

sources: https://www.aljazeera.com/sports/2026/7/3/fifa-world-cup-2026-round-of-16-bracket-friday-schedule-predictions (Round of 16 bracket: Canada v Morocco, Paraguay v France, Brazil v Norway, Mexico v England, Portugal v Spain, USA v Belgium, Argentina/Egypt, Switzerland/Colombia)

https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49263170/argentina-break-cape-verde-hearts-extra-world-cup-lionel-messi-scores (Argentina 3-2 Cape Verde AET; Messi 29' and 7 goals leads Golden Boot one clear of Mbappe; Duarte equaliser; Lopes Cabral strike; 111' decider off Romero header/own goal)

https://www.nbcsports.com/soccer/live/argentina-vs-cape-verde-live-updates-score-goals-highlights-stats-2026-fifa-world-cup-july-3 (Goals: Messi 29', Duarte 59', Lisandro Martinez 92', Lopes Cabral 103', Romero-credited 111')
https://www.espn.com/soccer/story/_/id/49262158/colombia-ghana-live-world-cup-2026-latest-updates-commentary-score-result (Colombia 1-0 Ghana; Jhon Arias 14'; Colombia to face Switzerland)
https://www.cafonline.com/fifa-world-cup/news/egypt-beat-australia-on-penalties-to-reach-historic-world-cup-last-16/ (Egypt 1-1 Australia, won 4-2 on penalties; first-ever knockout stage)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Egypt_at_the_FIFA_World_Cup (Egypt appearances: 1934, 1990, 2018, 2026; never past group stage before 2026)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/David_Villa (David Villa scored the only goal, 63', in Spain 1-0 Portugal, 2010 World Cup Round of 16)

https://www.mlssoccer.com/competitions/fifa-world-cup/news/biggest-world-cup-underdog-ever-cape-verde-seek-upset-of-argentina (Cape Verde population ~525,000, smallest nation ever to reach a World Cup knockout stage)
